name: consistent-ui
description: Claude Code skill for cross-codebase UI consistency auditing. Detects design drift across web, mobile, and template stacks.

plugins.name: consistent-ui
plugins.description: Enforce UI consistency across an entire codebase — detects drift in spacing, typography, colors, components, iconography, and interaction patterns across web, native mobile, and server-rendered templates. Generates a P0-P3 report and remediation plan.
